name: io.github.ohneben/activecampaign-mcp
description: ActiveCampaign MCP server — the full account API (v3 + SMS + WhatsApp + Segments, ~325 endpoints) as safety-categorized tools (Docker + Streamable HTTP).

environment_variables.name: ACTIVECAMPAIGN_API_URL
environment_variables.description: Your account's API URL, copied from ActiveCampaign -> Settings -> Developer, e.g. https://your-account.api-us1.com/api/3

environment_variables.name: ACTIVECAMPAIGN_API_TOKEN
environment_variables.description: Your ActiveCampaign API token (same Developer screen).

environment_variables.name: MCP_SHARED_TOKEN
environment_variables.description: Optional bearer token required on the /mcp endpoint. Empty = open (localhost only).
